title: prangos goniocarpa
intro: Prangos goniocarpa, also known as Ferula goniocarpa or Persian angelica, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Prangos goniocarpa include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Prangos goniocarpa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to promote healing and well-being.
